digest.title: Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius: Inside the Circular Financing of the GPU Boom
Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
digest.tldr: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them.  The feature, as originally…

digest.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
digest.tldr: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans.
